claims.summary: MLX to Ollama fallback can cause identity or texture shearing while still obeying shape/capacity rules.
Bridge-integrity or structural-persistence vocabulary would better preserve continuity than relying only on texture adjectives.
Raising HIGH_ENTROPY_TEXTURE_COMPAT_FALLBACK_SKIP_AT to 0.85 could widen textured expression before unstable fallback, but changes fallback model-selection behavior.
